overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game, walking through a neon-lit red corridor with arcade machines and vending machines, transitioning to an open plaza with holographic cherry blossoms and futuristic city views. The atmosphere is dense with red and pink neon lighting, scattered NPCs, and futuristic urban architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow corridor bathed in red neon light. A burning barrel sits on the left while arcade machines line the right wall. A character in a green jacket runs past in the opposite direction as the camera moves forward past a large planter with tropical plants.

passing close by a woman in white jacket standing in the center of the path

agents.ego_description: navigating through the corridor, observing dead bodies and avoiding a woman standing in the path

character in dark clothing standing near the wall observing the scene

stack of black crates or barriers blocking part of the walkway
multiple bodies lying on the ground suggesting recent combat
illuminated signs including 'BURRITO' and 'OPEN' neon displays

segments.scene_description: The corridor continues with vending machines and digital signage on the right. Dead bodies litter the ground indicating recent violence. A woman stands prominently in the center of the path with hands on hips as the camera approaches and passes her, moving toward the corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air cyberpunk plaza with holographic cherry blossoms and city view

approaching food stall and concrete stairs in the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking out of the corridor into the open plaza, approaching a food stall and observing the cityscape

futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon signs
teal-colored benches with integrated lighting underneath
street food vendor stall with bright overhead lighting and cooking equipment
wide staircase leading up to a higher level of the plaza
massive screen displaying animated advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up dramatically as the camera exits the corridor into a semi-open plaza. A massive holographic cherry blossom tree glows on the left against the city skyline. The camera passes glowing benches and approaches a food stall and concrete stairs, with large digital billboards illuminating the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-drenched corridor into a sprawling, futuristic open plaza. It begins in a narrow passage bathed in red light, moving past a burning barrel and arcade machines as a character in a green jacket dashes by. As the camera pushes forward past tropical plants and digital signage, the environment grows grimmer with bodies littering the ground before passing a woman standing defiantly in the center of the path. The scene then opens up dramatically as the camera exits the corridor, shifting from the tight red hallway into a wide plaza dominated by a massive, glowing holographic cherry blossom tree. Finally, the view expands across the city skyline, gliding past illuminated benches and digital billboards toward a food stall and concrete stairs.
